name: Honey Nut Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Cut the acorn squash lengthwise into halves, leaving the seeds intact. Place the cut sides up in a baking pan or on a baking sheet.
3. Bake for 30-45 minutes, or until the squash is soft. Remove the seeds and fibers from the inside of the squash.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the honey, chopped walnuts, raisins, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared squash halves.
6. Continue baking for 5-10 minutes more until the squash is lightly glazed.
7. Makes 4 servings.
